sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, haystack String, pattern String, replacement String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'abcdef', 'b', 'B'), (2, 'abcdef', 'e', 'E'), (3, 'abcdef', '', ''), (4, 'abcdef', 'abc', 'XYZ');
SELECT id, replaceOne(haystack, pattern, replacement) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, (replaceOne(haystack, pattern, replacement) || ' - modified') AS full_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, replaceOne(haystack || ' end', pattern, replacement) AS modified_ends FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num Int32, str_num String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
INSERT INTO test_numbers VALUES (1, '100'), (2, '200'), (3, '300'), (4, '');
SELECT num, replaceOne(str_num, '0', '5') AS replaced_num FROM test_numbers WHERE num > 1;
SELECT id, replaceOne(haystack, 'abc', 'XYZ') AS new_str FROM (SELECT id, haystack FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2));
SELECT id, (CASE WHEN str_num IS NULL THEN replaceOne(haystack, 'b', 'B') ELSE str_num END) AS result FROM test_strings JOIN test_numbers ON id = num;
CREATE TABLE test_nullable (id Int32, value Nullable(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_nullable VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'test'), (3, 'example');
SELECT id, replaceOne(value, 'test', 'TEST') AS modified_value FROM test_nullable WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (replaceOne(value, 'x', 'y') || ' ending') AS final_value FROM test_nullable;
SELECT id, replaceOne(NULLIF(haystack, ''), pattern, replacement) AS conditional_replacement FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count_modified FROM (SELECT id, replaceOne(haystack || ' added', pattern, replacement) FROM test_strings GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(haystack) > 0) GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_boundary (id Int32, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_boundary VALUES (1, 'boundary test'), (2, ''), (3, 'min test'), (4, 'max test');
SELECT id, replaceOne(data, '', 'NO CHAR') AS empty_replacement FROM test_boundary;
SELECT id, (replaceOne(CONCAT('Test', data), 'Test', 'Checked') || ' - Check') AS modified_string FROM test_boundary;
CREATE TABLE test_implicit_cast (id Int32, value String, number Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_implicit_cast VALUES (1, 'deferred', 10), (2, 'initial', 20), (3, 'complex', NULL);
SELECT id, replaceOne(value || CAST(number AS String), '10', 'FIVE') AS casted_replacement FROM test_implicit_cast;
